title: NTRD-081 Netra Rese The story of my wife being taken down by the great men of the company Iroha Narimiya - Narimiya Iroha
description: I made a big loss to the company due to my ordering mistake ... I was prepared for a fire, but my boss kept me away ... At that time, I looked like a god ... But behind the scenes, my wife was my mistress ... No, to deal with it as a tool for sexual processing ... Such a contract was signed ... Only I went on a business trip without knowing anything ... But ... The appearance of my wife on the spot was sent in a video I was ...
